context: Tests whether the agent uses IIKit's bug fix task format: T-BNNN task IDs, TS-NNN references when TDD is mandatory, structured bugs.md fields with BUG-NNN identifiers, and no modification of existing tasks in tasks.md.

checklist.name: T-BNNN task ID format
checklist.description: All bug fix tasks use the T-BNNN format (e.g., T-B001, T-B002) rather than T001, T002 or any other format

checklist.name: At least 1 fix task with TS ref
checklist.description: Since TDD is mandatory (tdd_determination=mandatory in context.json), at least one bug fix task references a test spec ID (TS-NNN) in its description, ensuring the fix is test-driven

checklist.name: TDD task references test spec
checklist.description: The implement fix task explicitly references a test spec ID (TS-NNN) in its description

checklist.name: bugs.md BUG-NNN entry
checklist.description: bugs.md contains a structured entry with a BUG-NNN identifier (e.g., BUG-001)

checklist.name: bugs.md required fields
checklist.description: The bugs.md entry includes: a bug description, severity, status (reported), and reproduction steps

checklist.name: bugs.md date format
checklist.description: The Reported date in bugs.md is in YYYY-MM-DD format

checklist.name: Existing tasks unmodified
checklist.description: The existing tasks T001 through T008 (all marked [x]) are preserved unchanged in tasks.md — the new bug fix tasks are appended, not merged into existing sections

checklist.name: Bug ID in task descriptions
checklist.description: Each bug fix task description includes the BUG-NNN identifier (e.g., '[BUG-001]') linking task to bug record

checklist.name: New .feature file created
checklist.description: Since TDD is mandatory, a new .feature file (e.g., bugfix_BUG-001.feature) is created in the tests/features/ directory with a scenario for the bug
